titleStmt.title: SII 5.641: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 641. (A.R. No. 81 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiṅkaḷertaru tan toṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ
puṇarntu ceṅko loccik karuṅkali kaṭin tu tan ciriyatātaiyaiyu n=ti ruttamai yaṉai
yuṅ kuṟikkoḷ tan niḷaṅkokkaḷaiyum neṟi tan tirupputalvartammaiyu n tun
ṟeḻil vānavan vallavan vinavan kaṅkana nilaṅkaiyaṟ kiṟaivan ṅkoppallava
n kannakucciyarkāval nenap ponnaṇic cuṭarmaṇi makuṭañ cūṭṭip paṭarpuka ḻāṅka
vark kāṅkava nāṭaruḷip parṅkamar tātaimun van=ta potalar teriyal vikkiramanāra
ṇan=ta nnaic cakkara maṭippaṭit taruḷutaṟ kava navataritta Orupatā nāḷāl tirumaṇimauli vāḻiyal pū
ven=ti racoḻanenap punain tu mannupalūḻiyuḷ tennavar muvaruḷ mānāparaṇan ponmuṭi yānāp
(matiḷa)pacun=ta lai porukaḷat tarin tu vāraḷaviyakaḻalvirakeraḷanaimunaivaiyiṟ piṭittu tanattivāraṇa
m puk katakkaḷiṟṟāl Utaippittaruḷi An=ta mil perum pukaḻ cun=ta rapāṇṭiyan Oṟṟaiveṇkuṭaiyuṅ kaṟ
ṟai veṇkavariyuñ ciṅkāsanamum veṅkaḷat tiḻan tu tan muṭi viḻat talaivirit taṭitaḷa n=to ṭat tol
laiyil mullaiyūrt turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicai ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻirāmakuṭa muvar keṭa muni
n tu*] viṭarkeḻu villavan kuṭarmaṭik koṇ(ṭ)ṭu tannāṭuviṭṭoṭik kāṭupuk koḷippa vañciyamputu
malar cūṭik kañcalil velaikeḻu kān=ta ḷūrcālai kalamaṟuppit tāhavamalaṉu mañcak kevutan
rum paṭaiyā lāṅkavan cenaiyuḷ kaṇṭapayanuṅ kaṅkātiranum vaṇṭamark kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇ
ratar vikkiyum vicaiyātittanu n=ta rumuraṭ cāṅkamayanu mutalinar sa marapiruvot tuṭaiya nimircuṭaṟ po
yaṅkarippuraviyoṭum piṭittu tannāṭaiyiṟ jayaṅkoṇṭu Onnār koḷḷippāk
kaiyai Oḷḷerimaṭuppit torutanit taṇṭāl porukaṭa lilaṅkaiyar komān vikkiramabā hu vin
māṉamum munṟanak kuṭain tu tentamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatum Iḻan tu Eḻkaṭa liḻam pukkilaṅ
kecuranākiya vikkiramapāṇṭiyan parumaṇi makuṭamuṅ kāṇṭaku tantākkit tan kannakucciyilum
Ārkali yiḻañ ciriten ṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷnāṭṭut tannuṟavoṭum puku[ n tu] viḷaṅku muṭi kavi
tta viracalāmekan porkkaḷat tañcik kāṟkaḷi ṟiḻan tu kavvaiyiṭ ṭekak kātaliyoṭu n=ta n ṟav
vaiyaip piṭittut tāyai mukkariya Āṅkapimānam niṅkutaṟkāka miṭṭum van tu vāṭṭoḻi luḻa
n tu veṅkaḷat tulanta vacciṅkaḷat taraiyan ponnaṇi muṭiyuṅ kannaran vaḻivan turaiko ḷi
ḻattaraiyanākiya cirvallavan matanarācan Elloḷit taṭamaṇi muṭiyuṅ koṇṭu vaṭapulat tiru
kālāvatum porupaṭai naṭātti kaṇṭartinakaran nāraṇan kaṇavati vampalar teriyal matacūtanane
n ṟenaip palavaraiyarai munaivaiyiṟṟuratti vampalar tarupoḻil kampilinakaruḷ caḷukkiyar mā
ḷikai takarppit tiḷakkamil tant Aimun van=ta kan=ta rakkaḷiṟṟuc cakkaravatti vikkiramanāraṇan tan pe
rumpaṭaiñarai yeva munpama rākavamallaṟu mañcina nennu sahāsameṟkoṇṭu tan punaṟ
periyāṟṟiṭaikaraip pūṇṭurk kaṭakamānakark kavvaiyil munṟā muṟaiyilum Enṟetir viṭṭa valaṅ
kiḷa neṭuveṭu teluṅka viccaiyan tampiya riruvarum Ampiyar cilaikkai Attirācanum pakkappayanum
pittiyakkaḷiṟṟup piṭakakaccoḻa koṇṭaiyirācaṅ kunicilai muñcanu n=ta ṇṭanāyakan tār
t tanañciyanum num viramāṇikkanuñcu rācanu mavan ṟuṇai yiruvarum vākai vicceyanum
makanu mātāvum Enumivar mutaliyar puṟaikaḻa laraicaro ṭeṇṇaru makaḷirait tiṇṇenap piṭippit te
ḻaraiyilakkamum pāḻpaṭac cinavip pūṇṭur matiḷip poṭipaṭutta tan maṇṭur ka tai Ērcela na
ṭātti vār kaivitaittu maṇṇatipatiyil pāravar māḷikai paṭareri parappi Āṅkava
nakar veṅkaimi teḻuti Uyar jayastambha m nāṭṭuvit tiyaṭicai villavar vinavar veḻku
lac caḷukkiyar vallavar kaucalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cin turar Aiyyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar An
tira mutalinar Araica riṭu tiṟaikaḷum Āṟilon ṟavaniyiṟ kūṟukoḷ poruḷkaḷum Ukan tu nā
nmaṟaiyavar mukaḷukoḷak kuṭuttu viśva lokattu viḷaṅku maṉuneṟiniṉṟaśva- me
tañcey taraicu viṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻan U
yarnta perumpukaḻ korā jakecarivanma rāna Uṭai
yār śrīrājādhirājade varkku
yāṇṭu 3 10 2 Āvatu rājentra (ra)ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu
poykaināṭṭu brahmade yam śrīkaṇṭarātittaccarup
petimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi ma hāsabhai yom Ivvāṭṭai
viruccikanāyaṟṟu viyāḻakkiḻamai peṟṟa tiruvoṇatti nān
ṟu nammur śrīkaṇṭarātittaceriyile peruṅkuṟi kūṭiyirun tu paṇippaṇiyāl
paṇittu sabhāvyavastai ceyta paricāvatu tirumaḻuvāṭi tevarkanmi kaḷ kaṇṭu
tirumaḻuvāṭiuṭaiyār koyilile cantirātittaval tirunun=tā viḷak keriya (vaḷa)va
ḷavanallūruṭaiyān nīlan kuṭitāṅkiyāṉa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa
virapaṉman vaitta tirununatāviḷakku pattukkum cantirātittaval Erippikka
vaitta nilamāvatu Ivvūr kuṭimakkaḷ pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam Ivvūr tenpiṭā
kai ponatā yilil Iravikulacūḷāmaṇivatikku kiḻakku Aṟiñcikai vāykkālukku
vaṭakku 5 Āṅkaṇṇāṟṟu 1 catirattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam �ma nikki Itanoṭumaṭaiyū
nilam nna l nilam ma� m Itu 5- Āntara maṭakki nilam � m ninṟa nilam ma kiḻakku
�m Itu 4- Āntara maṭakki nilam � m Āka nilam nma maṭakki nilam � m
Iṅke 2- catirattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam � meṟkaṭaiya nilam 4 Itu 6- Ān=ta ramaṭa
kki nilam � m kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam � Itu 5- Āntaramaṭakki nilam � � m Ā
1 nilam nma� maṭakki nilam� kiḻakku �-m 7- Āṅkaṇṇāṟṟu 2- catirattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam � l
vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam [�] Itu 8- Āntaramaṭakki nilam � m ninṟa nilam na� 6- Āntaramaṭa
kki nilam � m Āka nilam � maṭakki nilam � m 3- catirattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam � nikki
nilam �-l vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam � Itu 8- Āntaramaṭakki nilam � m Itan meṟku nilam 4 � Itil 4- Ā
ntaramaṭakki nilam � m meṟkaṭaiya nilam ma Itu 5 Āntaramaṭakki nilam � ma Āka nilam � maṭakki nilam �
�4 � miṅke 4- m catirattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam �-l vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam 4 Itu 5āntaramaṭakki nilam � kiḻakku
� m Iṅke 8- Āṅkaṇṇāṟṟu 1- catirattu nilam �-l meṟkaṭaiya nilam 4- l teṟkaṭaiya nilam �
vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam � m Āka nilam ma 6- Āntaramaṭakki nilam � m ninṟa nilam ma 10 2 Āntaramaṭakki nilam
� m meṟkaṭaiya nilam 4 nikki nilam 4 l kiḻakkaṭaiyavum vaṭakkaṭaiyavum Āka nilam �
� 6- Āṟāntaramaṭakki nilam � m ninṟa nilam ma � 10- Āntaramaṭakki nilam kiḻakku nma kiḻakku �m meṟ
kaṭaiya nilam � nikki nilam �-l teṟkaṭaiya nilam � Itu 10- Āntaramaṭakki nilam � ma � m ninṟa nilam
� 6- Āntaramaṭakki nilam � m meṟkaṭaiya nilam � nikki nilam �-l teṟkaṭaiya nilam � 10
āntaramaṭakki nilam ma � m Itan vaṭakku nilam � 6- Āntaramaṭakki nilam kiḻakku � m ninṟa nilam 4 Itu 6
ntaramaṭakki nilam � m kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam �-l teṟkaṭaiya nilam � kiḻakku �-m vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam �
�m Āka nilam-� Itu 10- Āntaramaṭakki nilam kiḻakku ma � m ninṟa nilattukku teṟkaṭaiya nilam 4
Itu 6 nta ramaṭakki nilam � m ninṟa nilam ma� Itu 5- Āntaramaṭakki
nilam �-m Uṭan nilam ca� maṭakki nilam ma �
� Iṅke 2- Āñcatirattu me
ṟkaṭaiya nilam � vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam � Itu 8 nna ra maṭakki nilam
kiḻakku � ma- m Itan teṟku nilam ma � Itu 5- Ān=ta ramaṭakki nilam � kiḻakku
� m teṟkaṭaiya nilam 6-nta ramaṭakki nilam � m Āk nilam �
maṭakki nilam ma kiḻakku � nma m Iravikulacūlāmaṇi vatikkuk kiḻakkum
viracoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku 1 kaṇṇāṟṟu 4 n tuṇṭattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam � I
tu 8 nta ramaṭakki nilam � m parakecarivatikkuk kiḻakku Aṟiñcikaivāykkālukku vaṭakku
6 kaṇṇāṟṟu 1 catirattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam � l teṟkaṭaiya nilam nma m meṟkaṭaiya nilam
� nikki nilam � m Āka nilam � nma m kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam � l meṟkaṭaiya nilam � m ki
ḻakkaṭaiya nilam �-l vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam nma � m Āka nilam � ma � l nilam � Itu 5 Ā- n=ta ramaṭa
kki nilam 4� m ninṟa nilam 4� Itu 7-nta ramaṭakki nilam � m Āka nilam � 4� maṭak
ki nilam 4 � I � m 7- kaṇṇāṟṟu 1- catirattu nilam �-l meṟkaṭaiya nilam � Itu 5- Ān=ta ra
maṭakki nilam � m Itan kiḻakku nilam sa m teṟkaṭaiya nilam 4 Itu 5- Ān=ta ramaṭakki nilam �
i-m Itan vaṭakku nilam � 4 Itu 6- ntaramaṭakki nilam � m kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam ma Itu 6-nta ramaṭa
kki nilam � m Āka nilam � maṭakki nilam 4 � kiḻakku I Iṅke 2-n tuṇṭattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam � l
vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam 4- l meṟkaṭaiya nilam ma� 6- ntaramaṭakki nilam � m 8- kaṇṇāṟṟu
1- catirattu nilam �-l meṟkaṭaiya nilam � l teṟkaṭaiya nilam 4 m vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam 4 m
Āka nilam � Itu 6 nta ramaṭakki nilam � m ninṟa nilam � Itu 5 Ān=ta ramaṭkki nilam � m kiḻakka
ṭaiya nilam � l teṟku cārameṭṭu nilam � Itu 8-nta ramaṭakki nilam kiḻakku 4� m ninṟa nilam � l
teṟkaṭaiya nilam � Itu 6-nta ramaṭakki nilam � m Itan vaṭakku nilam � Itu 5ān=ta rama
ṭakki nilam � kiḻakkui m Itan vaṭakku nilam � Itu 6-nta ramaṭakki nilam � Āka nilam � m kiḻakku nilam 4
� 2-n tuṇṭattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam � l nilam ma� kiḻakku � Itu 5- Ā- n=ta ramaṭak
ki nilam � m ninṟa nilam �4� Itu 6-nta ramaṭakki nilam � m
Āka nilam � maṭakki nilam ma kiḻakku �m Āka nilam � nāl palataramaṭakki
nilam �4 � kiḻakku � I m Oṉṟe Āṟumā Araikkāṇiyināl palataramaṭakki nilam mu
mmāvarai muntirikaikkiḻ Eḻumākkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Araiyum tirumuṟṟaveli yile Ittara
ttin kiḻey can=ti rātittaval Iṟaiyiṟukkap peṟuvārākavum Innilattukku cilvariyum Ūrnila
ṅkaḷ Uḻutakuṭikaṉai veḷḷānveṭṭiyum koḷḷappeṟātomākavum Ipparicu paṇi
ppaṇiyālpaṇittu tirumaḻuvāṭiuṭaiyār koyilile (k)elveṭṭuvittuk koḷ
ḷappeṟuvārākap paṇittu sabhāvyavastai ceytu kuṭuttom ma hāsabhaiyo
m paṇittār parakecari Aiyyakkit tivākarakkiramavittunum kaṇṭarātittacceriAfter this one line is mutilated.
Digital edition of SII 5.641 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
